name: FileUpload
description: Drag-and-drop file dropzone with progress and validation.

api.name: FileUpload
api.description: Drag-and-drop file dropzone with progress and validation.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, setting aria-required and (outside a FormField, on the Dropzone/generic label) appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive border on the dropzone, destructive helper text) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the control (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the control (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Field name for form-field integration. Not currently rendered onto the underlying <InputFile> element.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text. Rendered above the control on the Dropzone/Avatar variants when outside a FormField, or as the Dropzone's headline / the Button variant's caption when set.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Secondary helper text shown below the headline on the Dropzone variant (e.g. accepted types or size limits).

parameters.name: Multiple
parameters.description: Allows selecting more than one file at once. Ignored by the Avatar variant, which is always single-file.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: The native accept attribute value (e.g. "image/*" or ".pdf,.docx"), used both to filter the OS file picker and to validate dropped/selected files client-side.

parameters.name: MaxFileSize
parameters.description: Maximum size in bytes allowed per file; larger files are rejected with MaxFileSizeError (or a localized default). Default 10 MB.

parameters.name: MaxFiles
parameters.description: Maximum number of files (counting non-failed/cancelled existing items) allowed in the selection at once; exceeding it rejects the whole new batch with MaxFilesError. Default 10.

parameters.name: ShowThumbnails
parameters.description: Renders an inline image preview (data URI) for image files, on both the file-list rows and the Avatar variant's picker.

parameters.name: FileTemplate
parameters.description: Custom render fragment for each file-list row, receiving the underlying IBrowserFile. Falls back to the built-in row (icon/thumbnail, name, size, status, progress, actions) when unset.

parameters.name: ShowFileList
parameters.description: When true (default), renders the internal file card list after selection. Set to false for immediate-upload flows where the app renders its own file list — the internal card with the remove-X will no longer linger after the upload completes. Selection and upload events (OnFilesSelected, OnUpload, OnFileUploaded) still fire normally regardless of this setting. Pair with Reset via @@ref to clear state and allow the same file to be re-picked.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual presentation: Dropzone (drag-and-drop area, default), Button (compact inline trigger button), or Avatar (single circular image picker).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size of the trigger when Variant="Button". Mirrors ButtonSize so a button-variant FileUpload can match neighbouring buttons in toolbars or compact forms. Has no visual effect on Dropzone or Avatar variants today.

parameters.name: ShowProgress
parameters.description: Legacy: shows a single global progress bar driven by Progress. Ignored once OnUpload is set, since per-file progress is tracked automatically.

parameters.name: OnUpload
parameters.description: Consumer-supplied upload handler. Called once per file after selection (or after explicit StartUploadAsync if AutoUpload is false). Receives the item, an IProgress{T} for reporting percent 0-100, and a CancellationToken that fires if the user clicks Cancel. Should return the server-assigned URL/id on success, or throw/return null on failure.

parameters.name: AutoUpload
parameters.description: When true (default), uploads begin immediately after files are selected. When false, the user must click the Upload button to start. Requires OnUpload to be set.

parameters.name: MaxConcurrentUploads
parameters.description: Maximum number of OnUpload calls running simultaneously.

parameters.name: ChunkSize
parameters.description: Optional chunk size hint (bytes) for consumers that want to implement chunked/resumable upload inside their OnUpload handler. The component passes this value through ChunkSize but does NOT implement chunking itself.

parameters.name: MaxFileSizeError
parameters.description: Overrides the default localized "exceeds max size" message shown when a file is rejected for being larger than MaxFileSize.

parameters.name: MaxFilesError
parameters.description: Overrides the default "Maximum N files allowed" message shown when a selection would exceed MaxFiles.

parameters.name: FileTypeError
parameters.description: Overrides the default "unsupported file type" message shown when a file doesn't match Accept.

parameters.name: OnFilesSelected
parameters.description: Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat).

parameters.name: OnFileUploaded
parameters.description: Fires each time a file upload succeeds.

parameters.name: OnAllUploaded
parameters.description: Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled).

parameters.name: OnFileFailed
parameters.description: Fires each time a file upload fails.

parameters.name: OnFileRemoved
parameters.description: Fires when a file is removed from the list.

parameters.name: OnFileRejected
parameters.description: Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the variant-specific root element (the dropzone/button/avatar wrapper).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the variant-specific root element.

events.name: OnFilesSelected
events.description: Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat).

events.name: OnFileUploaded
events.description: Fires each time a file upload succeeds.

events.name: OnAllUploaded
events.description: Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled).

events.name: OnFileFailed
events.description: Fires each time a file upload fails.

events.name: OnFileRemoved
events.description: Fires when a file is removed from the list.

events.name: OnFileRejected
events.description: Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints.

examples.title: Image Upload
examples.code:
<FileUpload
    Label="Upload an image"
    Description="PNG, JPG or GIF up to 10MB"
    Accept="image/*"
    OnFilesSelected="HandleFiles" />

examples.title: Multiple Files
examples.code:
<FileUpload
    Label="Upload documents"
    Description="Select one or more files"
    Multiple="true"
    OnFilesSelected="HandleFiles" />

examples.title: Upload with progress (fake delay)
examples.code:
<FileUpload
    Multiple="true"
    Label="Upload files"
    OnUpload="@SimulateUpload"
    OnFileUploaded="@(item => _uploadedCount++)"
    OnAllUploaded="@(items => _allDoneMsg = $"All {items.Count} file(s) done!")"  />

@code {
    private async Task<string?> SimulateUpload(
        FileUpload.FileUploadItem item,
        IProgress<int> progress,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        for (int pct = 0; pct <= 100; pct += 10)
        {
            ct.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();
            progress.Report(pct);
            await Task.Delay(50, ct);
        }
        return $"https://cdn.example.com/{item.Name}";
    }
}

slots.name: FileTemplate
slots.description: Custom render fragment for each file-list row, receiving the underlying IBrowserFile. Falls back to the built-in row (icon/thumbnail, name, size, status, progress, actions) when unset.

mdSummary:
# FileUpload

Drag-and-drop file dropzone with progress and validation.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/file-upload

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FileUpload | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Required | `bool` | `false` | Marks the field as required, setting aria-required and (outside a FormField, on the Dropzone/generic label) appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label. |
| FileUpload | Invalid | `bool` | `false` | Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive border on the dropzone, destructive helper text) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state. |
| FileUpload | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the control (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText. |
| FileUpload | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the control (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display. |
| FileUpload | Name | `string?` | `` | Field name for form-field integration. Not currently rendered onto the underlying \<InputFile\> element. |
| FileUpload | Label | `string?` | `` | Label text. Rendered above the control on the Dropzone/Avatar variants when outside a FormField, or as the Dropzone's headline / the Button variant's caption when set. |
| FileUpload | Description | `string?` | `` | Secondary helper text shown below the headline on the Dropzone variant (e.g. accepted types or size limits). |
| FileUpload | Multiple | `bool` | `false` | Allows selecting more than one file at once. Ignored by the Avatar variant, which is always single-file. |
| FileUpload | Accept | `string?` | `` | The native accept attribute value (e.g. "image/*" or ".pdf,.docx"), used both to filter the OS file picker and to validate dropped/selected files client-side. |
| FileUpload | MaxFileSize | `long` | `10 * 1024 * 1024` | Maximum size in bytes allowed per file; larger files are rejected with MaxFileSizeError (or a localized default). Default 10 MB. |
| FileUpload | MaxFiles | `int` | `10` | Maximum number of files (counting non-failed/cancelled existing items) allowed in the selection at once; exceeding it rejects the whole new batch with MaxFilesError. Default 10. |
| FileUpload | ShowThumbnails | `bool` | `false` | Renders an inline image preview (data URI) for image files, on both the file-list rows and the Avatar variant's picker. |
| FileUpload | FileTemplate | `RenderFragment\<IBrowserFile\>?` | `` | Custom render fragment for each file-list row, receiving the underlying IBrowserFile. Falls back to the built-in row (icon/thumbnail, name, size, status, progress, actions) when unset. |
| FileUpload | ShowFileList | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), renders the internal file card list after selection. Set to false for immediate-upload flows where the app renders its own file list — the internal card with the remove-X will no longer linger after the upload completes. Selection and upload events (OnFilesSelected, OnUpload, OnFileUploaded) still fire normally regardless of this setting. Pair with Reset via @@ref to clear state and allow the same file to be re-picked. |
| FileUpload | Variant | `FileUploadVariant` | `FileUploadVariant.Dropzone` | Visual presentation: Dropzone (drag-and-drop area, default), Button (compact inline trigger button), or Avatar (single circular image picker). |
| FileUpload | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Size of the trigger when Variant="Button". Mirrors ButtonSize so a button-variant FileUpload can match neighbouring buttons in toolbars or compact forms. Has no visual effect on Dropzone or Avatar variants today. |
| FileUpload | ShowProgress | `bool` | `false` | Legacy: shows a single global progress bar driven by Progress. Ignored once OnUpload is set, since per-file progress is tracked automatically. |
| FileUpload | Progress | `int` | `0` |  |
| FileUpload | OnUpload | `Func\<FileUploadItem, IProgress\<int\>, CancellationToken, Task\<string?\>\>?` | `` | Consumer-supplied upload handler. Called once per file after selection (or after explicit StartUploadAsync if AutoUpload is false). Receives the item, an IProgress{T} for reporting percent 0-100, and a CancellationToken that fires if the user clicks Cancel. Should return the server-assigned URL/id on success, or throw/return null on failure. |
| FileUpload | AutoUpload | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), uploads begin immediately after files are selected. When false, the user must click the Upload button to start. Requires OnUpload to be set. |
| FileUpload | MaxConcurrentUploads | `int` | `3` | Maximum number of OnUpload calls running simultaneously. |
| FileUpload | ChunkSize | `long?` | `` | Optional chunk size hint (bytes) for consumers that want to implement chunked/resumable upload inside their OnUpload handler. The component passes this value through ChunkSize but does NOT implement chunking itself. |
| FileUpload | MaxFileSizeError | `string?` | `` | Overrides the default localized "exceeds max size" message shown when a file is rejected for being larger than MaxFileSize. |
| FileUpload | MaxFilesError | `string?` | `` | Overrides the default "Maximum N files allowed" message shown when a selection would exceed MaxFiles. |
| FileUpload | FileTypeError | `string?` | `` | Overrides the default "unsupported file type" message shown when a file doesn't match Accept. |
| FileUpload | OnFilesSelected | `EventCallback\<InputFileChangeEventArgs\>` | `` | Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat). |
| FileUpload | OnFileUploaded | `EventCallback\<FileUploadItem\>` | `` | Fires each time a file upload succeeds. |
| FileUpload | OnAllUploaded | `EventCallback\<IReadOnlyList\<FileUploadItem\>\>` | `` | Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled). |
| FileUpload | OnFileFailed | `EventCallback\<FileUploadItem\>` | `` | Fires each time a file upload fails. |
| FileUpload | OnFileRemoved | `EventCallback\<FileUploadItem\>` | `` | Fires when a file is removed from the list. |
| FileUpload | OnFileRejected | `EventCallback\<(IBrowserFile File, string Reason)\>` | `` | Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints. |
| FileUpload | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the variant-specific root element (the dropzone/button/avatar wrapper). |
| FileUpload | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the variant-specific root element. |

## Slots
- `FileTemplate` (FileUpload) — Custom render fragment for each file-list row, receiving the underlying IBrowserFile. Falls back to the built-in row (icon/thumbnail, name, size, status, progress, actions) when unset.

## Events
- `OnFilesSelected` (`EventCallback<InputFileChangeEventArgs>`) — Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat).
- `OnFileUploaded` (`EventCallback<FileUploadItem>`) — Fires each time a file upload succeeds.
- `OnAllUploaded` (`EventCallback<IReadOnlyList<FileUploadItem>>`) — Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled).
- `OnFileFailed` (`EventCallback<FileUploadItem>`) — Fires each time a file upload fails.
- `OnFileRemoved` (`EventCallback<FileUploadItem>`) — Fires when a file is removed from the list.
- `OnFileRejected` (`EventCallback<(IBrowserFile File, string Reason)>`) — Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<FileUpload />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/FileUpload/FileUpload.razor`
